assertions.description: PerformanceObserver.supportedEntryTypes advertises the exact 'soft-navigation' entry type when the origin-trial feature is active.
PerformanceObserver.supportedEntryTypes advertises the exact 'interaction-contentful-paint' entry type when the origin-trial feature is active.
The soft-navigation PerformanceEntry interface is exposed as SoftNavigationEntry or a Chrome implementation alias.
assertions.test: typeof SoftNavigationEntry === 'function' || typeof PerformanceSoftNavigation === 'function' || typeof PerformanceSoftNavigationTiming === 'function'

assertions.description: Soft-navigation entries expose navigationType for push, replace, or traverse.
Soft-navigation entries expose interactionId for correlation with interaction-contentful-paint entries.
Soft-navigation entries expose largestInteractionContentfulPaint as the paint attributed to the route interaction.
InteractionContentfulPaint is exposed for paints attributed to interactions.
InteractionContentfulPaint exposes interactionId plus paint timing fields used for soft-navigation LCP.
assertions.test: (()=>{const C=globalThis.InteractionContentfulPaint;return typeof C==='function'&&'interactionId' in C.prototype&&'renderTime' in C.prototype&&'loadTime' in C.prototype&&'size' in C.prototype&&'url' in C.prototype})()

assertions.description: PerformanceEntry exposes navigationId so performance entries can be correlated with a navigation.
